case_title: PROGRESSIVE SELECT INSURANCE COMPANY VS. JOSHUA PANIS ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 585 (TRANSACTION ID # 66005134) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE SELECT INSURANCE COMPANY
